---
title: "restoreGraph()"
description: "Restore a graph instance from a checkpoint and restore registry."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Restore a graph instance from a checkpoint and restore registry.

## Import

```ts
import { restoreGraph } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
```

## Signature

```ts
function restoreGraph(
	checkpoint: GraphCheckpoint,
	options: RestoreGraphOptions,
): Graph
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `checkpoint` | `GraphCheckpoint` | Serialized graph checkpoint to restore. |
| `options` | `RestoreGraphOptions` | Restore registry and optional dispatcher/versioning overrides. |

## Returns

A live graph rebuilt from the checkpoint.

## Example

```ts
import { defaultRestoreRegistry, graph, restoreGraph } from "@graphrefly/ts";

const original = graph();
const restored = restoreGraph(original.checkpoint(), { registry: defaultRestoreRegistry });
```

`packages/ts/src/graph/restore.ts`
